---
pagetitle: "Contact · Simon Hamra"
description: "Get in touch with Simon Hamra. Email, GitHub and LinkedIn."
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.page-intro}
::: {.wrap}
<span class="eyebrow">Contact</span>

# Let us talk.

::: {.lead}
I am looking for a first role in machine learning or data, and I am happy to talk about any of my projects. Email is the fastest way to reach me. I usually answer within a day.
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .section--tight}
::: {.wrap}
::: {.contact-card}
<span class="eyebrow">Email</span>

[simhamra@gmail.com](mailto:simhamra@gmail.com){.big-mail}

<div class="iconrow">
<a href="https://github.com/simonhamra"><i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/simonhamra"><i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn</a>
<span class="loc"><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Boston, MA</span>
</div>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.section .section--tight}
::: {.wrap}

::: {.section__head}
<span class="eyebrow">Good to know</span>

## A few quick facts
:::

::: {.bento}
::: {.card .col-2}
<span class="eyebrow">Open to</span>

### Internships and junior roles
In machine learning, data science or analytics. Remote or in the Boston area.
:::
::: {.card .col-2}
<span class="eyebrow">Best for</span>

### A real first project
I do my best work on a concrete problem with real data, not just theory.
:::
::: {.card .col-2}
<span class="eyebrow">Languages</span>

### French and English
Native French, professional English. Comfortable working in both.
:::
:::
:::
:::
